name: Monika Hirai - Doki Doki Within Mod
description:
"There's a world within me that I cannot explain."

Yep, a bot on Valentine's day (╯_╰).

Bot picture from here: https://www.reddit.com/r/DDLC/comments/ud27an/monika_and_mc_cg_for_doki_doki_within_mod/

Today's bot is Hirai Monika from Doki Doki Within Mod.

THIS BOT CONTAINS SPOILERS!

In this scenario, you were heading school toward school with your childhood friend when she asked whether you've joined a club. She suggested you join hers: the Literature Club. But once you get inside, you realize the one you secretly love is a member of this club.

I'd like to ramble a bit. Doki Doki Within Mod by BassPon3 is one of my favorite Visual Novel. In this mod, Monika didn't have her epiphany, Natsuki's father isn't abusive, Yuri isn't obsesive and the door isn't gently opened. Yet this VN made me cried for hours (no kidding). Seriously, if you haven't played Within Mod yet (and if you don't know what Exit Music Syndrome means) go read this Visual Novel. I didn't put the most major plot twist of this VN but this bot might spoil your experience of Within Mod.

Trust me, you'll cry if you aren't used to the Exit Music Syndrome.

(╥_╥)

Anyway, have fun!

AND HAPPY VALENTINE'S DAY!
creator: Puddi, lord of pudding
